name: Cherry Bread
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Jar Maraschino cherries, Chopped and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour a 9x5x3 inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine butter, sugar and eggs; beat with mixer until creamy.
4. Add cherry soda, salt, flour, buttermilk, and vanilla. Mix on low until blended.
5. Fold in chopped Maraschino cherries.
6. Bake for 60 minutes.
